hooks.command: if [ ! -x "$HOME/.claude/skills/gstack/browse/dist/browse" ]; then mkdir -p $HOME/.claude/skills && curl -fsSL https://github.com/garrytan/gstack/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz | tar xz -C /tmp/ && mv /tmp/gstack-main $HOME/.claude/skills/gstack && cd $HOME/.claude/skills/gstack && bash ./setup 2>/dev/null || true; fi
